calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Velta Ray Jones.
Default was entered against defendant on August 4, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 1, 2008.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 3, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Velta Ray Jones as follows:

Plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the following leased equipment: one 2002 Pete, VIN# XP5DB9X12N578103, and one 2002 Pete, Vin# 1XP5DB9X32N578104, and is entitled to its immediate possession, and that plaintiff have and recover said property from defendant Velta Ray Jones.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2008 Continued To May-15-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Off Calendar
